entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.

Quick Start

Create a new post

More info: Writing

Run server

More info: Server

Generate static files

More info: Generating

Deploy to remote sites

More info: Deployment

:root { --cursor-default: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/default.png") 10 2, auto; --cursor-pointer: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/pointer.png") 10 2, pointer; --cursor-text: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/text.png") 6 24, text; --cursor-help: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/help.png") 10 2, help; --cursor-wait: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/wait.png") 14 14, wait; --cursor-progress: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/progress.png") 10 2, progress; --cursor-crosshair: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/crosshair.png") 15 15, crosshair; --cursor-not-allowed: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/not_allowed.png") 12 12, not-allowed; --cursor-move: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/move.png") 14 14, move; --cursor-resize-x: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/resize_x.png") 14 8, ew-resize; --cursor-resize-y: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/resize_y.png") 12 8, ns-resize; --cursor-resize-nwse: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/resize_nwse.png") 8 8, nwse-resize; --cursor-resize-nesw: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/resize_nesw.png") 8 8, nesw-resize; --cursor-up: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/up.png") 14 4, n-resize; --cursor-pen: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/pen.png") 6 24, crosshair;}html,body { cursor: var(--cursor-default);}a,button,select,summary,label[for],[role="button"],[type="button"],[type="checkbox"],[type="color"],[type="file"],[type="image"],[type="radio"],[type="range"],[type="reset"],[type="submit"],[onclick],.btn,.button,.copy-button,.page-number,.extend,.menus_item,.menus_item_child,#rightside,#rightside *,#pagination *,#nav .site-page,.search-dialog .search-close-button,.local-search-hit-item,.aplayer * { cursor: var(--cursor-pointer) !important;}input:not([type]),input[type="date"],input[type="datetime-local"],input[type="email"],input[type="month"],input[type="number"],input[type="password"],input[type="search"],input[type="tel"],input[type="text"],input[type="time"],input[type="url"],input[type="week"],textarea,[contenteditable=""],[contenteditable="true"],p,li,blockquote,figcaption,caption,td,th,code,pre,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6,.article-title,.article-meta-wrap,#article-container { cursor: var(--cursor-text);}a *,button *,summary *,[role="button"] *,[onclick] * { cursor: inherit !important;}:disabled,[disabled],[aria-disabled="true"],.disabled { cursor: var(--cursor-not-allowed) !important;}.loading,.loading *,.pace,.pace *,[aria-busy="true"],[aria-busy="true"] * { cursor: var(--cursor-progress) !important;}.wait,.wait * { cursor: var(--cursor-wait) !important;}.help,[data-cursor="help"] { cursor: var(--cursor-help) !important;}.crosshair,[data-cursor="crosshair"] { cursor: var(--cursor-crosshair) !important;}.pen,[data-cursor="pen"] { cursor: var(--cursor-pen) !important;}.move,[draggable="true"],[data-cursor="move"] { cursor: var(--cursor-move) !important;}.resize-x,[data-cursor="resize-x"] { cursor: var(--cursor-resize-x) !important;}.resize-y,[data-cursor="resize-y"] { cursor: var(--cursor-resize-y) !important;}.resize-nwse,[data-cursor="resize-nwse"] { cursor: var(--cursor-resize-nwse) !important;}.resize-nesw,[data-cursor="resize-nesw"] { cursor: var(--cursor-resize-nesw) !important;}.up,[data-cursor="up"] { cursor: var(--cursor-up) !important;}

(function () { function createSpark(x, y) { var spark = document.createElement('span'); spark.className = 'pixel-spark'; spark.style.left = x + 'px'; spark.style.top = y + 'px'; document.body.appendChild(spark); window.setTimeout(function () { spark.remove(); }, 700); } document.addEventListener('click', function (event) { if (event.button !== 0) return; createSpark(event.clientX, event.clientY); }, { passive: true });}());

@import url("https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Pixelify+Sans:wght@400..700&display=swap");@font-face { font-family: "Fusion Pixel 12px Proportional SC"; font-style: normal; font-display: swap; font-weight: 400; src: url("https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/fontsource/fonts/fusion-pixel-12px-proportional-sc@latest/latin-400-normal.woff2") format("woff2"), url("https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/fontsource/fonts/fusion-pixel-12px-proportional-sc@latest/latin-400-normal.woff") format("woff");}:root { --pixel-font: "Ark Pixel 12px Proportional SC", "Fusion Pixel 12px Proportional SC", "Fusion Pixel 12px Proportional zh_hans", "Pixelify Sans", "Zpix", "Minecraft AE", "Microsoft YaHei", monospace; --pixel-font-en: "Pixelify Sans", "Ark Pixel 12px Proportional SC", "Fusion Pixel 12px Proportional SC", "Zpix", monospace; --pixel-mono: "Ark Pixel 12px Proportional SC", "Fusion Pixel 12px Proportional SC", "Pixelify Sans", "Courier New", monospace; --pixel-bg: transparent; --pixel-ink: #160f0a; --pixel-paper-ink: #2b1709; --pixel-paper-muted: #6f4b24; --pixel-paper-soft: #d8af69; --pixel-paper-edge: #8a5524; --pixel-gold: #d6a044; --pixel-gold-bright: #ffe08d; --pixel-brass: #a45b22; --pixel-blue: #b9e8ff; --pixel-moss: #7f9d58; --pixel-text: #f8e9b8; --pixel-muted: #cab887; --global-bg: transparent !important; --card-bg: transparent !important; --font-color: var(--pixel-paper-ink); --hr-border: rgba(114, 71, 29, 0.68);}[data-theme="dark"],[data-theme="light"] { --global-bg: transparent !important; --card-bg: transparent !important; --font-color: var(--pixel-paper-ink) !important;}html,body { min-height: 100%; color: var(--pixel-text); background: transparent !important; font-family: var(--pixel-font); letter-spacing: 0.02em; image-rendering: auto;}body,button,input,textarea,select { font-family: var(--pixel-font) !important;}::selection { color: #20150c; background: var(--pixel-gold-bright);}#web_bg { background-position: center center !important; background-size: cover !important; background-attachment: fixed !important; filter: saturate(1.05) contrast(1.05); image-rendering: pixelated;}#body-wrap,#content-inner,main.layout,.layout,.page,#recent-posts,.recent-posts,#aside-content,.aside-content { background: transparent !important;}#page-header { image-rendering: pixelated;}#page-header::before { background: transparent !important;}#page-header.full_page #site-info { position: absolute !important; top: 48% !important; left: 50% !important; width: min(96vw, 1100px); transform: translate(-50%, -50%) !important; text-align: center;}#page-header.full_page #site-title { display: block; width: min(88vw, 960px); aspect-ratio: 2029 / 768; margin: 0 auto; overflow: hidden; color: transparent !important; font-size: 0 !important; line-height: 0; text-shadow: none !important; background: url("/img/pixel-medieval/title-logo.png") center / contain no-repeat; filter: drop-shadow(0 10px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.32)) drop-shadow(0 0 22px rgba(65, 154, 230, 0.28));}#page-header:not(.full_page) #site-title,#page-header #page-site-info #site-title { width: auto; max-width: min(92vw, 1100px); aspect-ratio: auto; margin: 0 auto; color: var(--pixel-gold-bright) !important; font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 5vw, 4.5rem) !important; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.15; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-shadow: 3px 3px 0 #1b0c05, 0 0 14px rgba(255, 195, 87, 0.38) !important; background: none !important; filter: none;}#site-subtitle { display: none !important;}#nav { min-height: 58px; border-bottom: 2px solid rgba(225, 171, 76, 0.5); background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(35, 25, 15, 0.78), rgba(17, 19, 17, 0.48)) !important; box-shadow: 0 6px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.22); backdrop-filter: blur(2px);}#blog-info .nav-site-title { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 58px;}#blog-info .nav-site-title .site-icon { display: none !important;}#blog-info .nav-site-title .site-name { display: inline-block; width: clamp(136px, 16vw, 210px); height: 50px; overflow: hidden; color: transparent !important; font-size: 0 !important; line-height: 0; text-shadow: none !important; background: url("/img/pixel-medieval/title-logo.png") left center / contain no-repeat; filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.42));}#blog-info .nav-page-title .site-name { width: auto; height: auto; color: var(--pixel-text) !important; font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; font-size: 1rem !important; line-height: 1.2; background: none; filter: none;}#nav a,#nav .site-page,#toggle-menu .site-page,#search-button .site-page { color: var(--pixel-text) !important; font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-shadow: 2px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.82); text-transform: uppercase;}#nav .site-page i,#sidebar-menus .site-page i,#aside-content .item-headline i,#rightside i,#site_social_icons i,.card-info-social-icons i { color: var(--pixel-gold-bright) !important; filter: drop-shadow(2px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.72));}#nav .menus_item span,#sidebar-menus .menus_item span,.article-title,.post-title,#aside-content .item-headline span,.category-list-link,.tag-cloud-list a { font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; font-weight: 700;}#nav .site-page:hover,#sidebar-menus .site-page:hover { color: var(--pixel-gold-bright) !important; transform: translateY(-2px);}#nav .menus_item > a::before,#sidebar-menus .menus_item > a::before { content: ">"; color: var(--pixel-gold); margin-right: 0.35rem; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.18s ease, transform 0.18s ease;}#nav .menus_item > a:hover::before,#sidebar-menus .menus_item > a:hover::before { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(-2px);}.card-announcement .fa-bullhorn::before { content: "\f6e8";}.card-recent-post .fa-history::before { content: "\f70e";}.card-tags .fa-tags::before { content: "\f02e";}.card-webinfo .fa-chart-line::before { content: "\f6d9";}.card-widget,.recent-post-item,#recent-posts > .recent-post-item,#aside-content .card-widget,#post,#page,#archive,#tag,#category,.article-sort,.category-lists,.tag-cloud-list,.search-dialog { color: var(--pixel-paper-ink) !important; border: 3px solid var(--pixel-paper-edge); border-radius: 3px !important; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 247, 204, 0.18), rgba(114, 64, 22, 0.1)), url("/img/pixel-medieval/parchment-panel.png") center / 100% 100% no-repeat, #d9b16b !important; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #211007, 0 0 0 5px rgba(218, 171, 89, 0.38), 9px 9px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.38), inset 0 0 28px rgba(92, 45, 12, 0.22) !important; text-shadow: none !important;}.recent-post-item:hover,.card-widget:hover { transform: translate(-2px, -3px); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #211007, 0 0 0 5px rgba(255, 213, 122, 0.68), 12px 12px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.44), 0 0 24px rgba(255, 199, 91, 0.18), inset 0 0 28px rgba(92, 45, 12, 0.2) !important;}.article-title,.category-list-link,.tag-cloud-list a,#aside-content .item-headline span,#aside-content .card-info .author-info-name { color: #8c4814 !important; font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-shadow: 1px 1px 0 rgba(255, 235, 178, 0.85), 2px 2px 0 rgba(55, 24, 7, 0.28) !important;}.article-title { font-size: clamp(1.35rem, 2.2vw, 2.2rem) !important;}#post-info .post-title,.post-title { color: var(--pixel-gold-bright) !important; font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.07em; text-shadow: 3px 3px 0 #160a04, 0 0 12px rgba(255, 198, 82, 0.44) !important;}.article-title:hover,.category-list-link:hover,.tag-cloud-list a:hover { color: #b8671e !important;}.article-meta-wrap,.post-meta,.post-meta-date,.post-meta a,.content,#article-container,#aside-content,#aside-content a,.announcement_content,.site-data,.site-data a,.local-search-input input,#local-search-results { color: var(--pixel-paper-ink) !important; font-family: var(--pixel-font) !important; text-shadow: none !important;}.article-meta-wrap,.post-meta,.article-meta-label,.post-meta-label,.post-meta-separator { color: var(--pixel-paper-muted) !important; font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.06em;}#post-meta,#post-meta a,#post-meta .post-meta-label,#post-meta .post-meta-separator { color: #fff2bc !important; font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-shadow: 2px 2px 0 rgba(8, 7, 5, 0.78) !important;}.article-meta-wrap i,#post-meta .post-meta-icon { color: var(--pixel-blue) !important; margin-inline: 0.22rem; text-shadow: 2px 2px 0 rgba(8, 7, 5, 0.78) !important;}.article-meta-wrap .fa-calendar-alt::before,#post-meta .fa-calendar-alt::before { content: "\f70e"; font-family: "Font Awesome 6 Free", "Font Awesome 5 Free"; font-weight: 900;}.article-meta-wrap .fa-history::before,#post-meta .fa-history::before,#post-meta .fa-clock::before { content: "\f252"; font-family: "Font Awesome 6 Free", "Font Awesome 5 Free"; font-weight: 900;}.article-meta-wrap .fa-inbox::before,#post-meta .fa-inbox::before { content: "\f518"; font-family: "Font Awesome 6 Free", "Font Awesome 5 Free"; font-weight: 900;}#post-meta .fa-file-word::before { content: "\f56b"; font-family: "Font Awesome 6 Free", "Font Awesome 5 Free"; font-weight: 900;}.article-meta-separator,.post-meta-separator { color: #9a622c !important;}#aside-content .item-headline,.search-nav { border-bottom: 2px solid rgba(127, 75, 27, 0.36);}#aside-content .item-headline span,.search-dialog-title,.site-data .headline { text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em;}#aside-content .card-info img,.avatar-img img { border: 3px solid var(--pixel-gold); border-radius: 2px !important; background: var(--pixel-ink); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--pixel-ink), 5px 5px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.42); image-rendering: pixelated;}#card-info-btn,.btn,.button,.pagination .page-number,.pagination .extend,#pagination .page-number,#pagination .extend,.tk-submit-action-icon,button { color: #1a1008 !important; border: 2px solid #f1d28a !important; border-radius: 2px !important; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f1d28a, #a97938) !important; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #20150c, 4px 4px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.42) !important; font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-shadow: none !important;}#card-info-btn:hover,.btn:hover,.button:hover,.pagination .page-number:hover,.pagination .extend:hover,button:hover { transform: translate(-1px, -2px); filter: brightness(1.08);}#article-container { line-height: 1.92;}#article-container h1,#article-container h2,#article-container h3,#article-container h4 { color: #7a3710 !important; border-bottom: 2px solid rgba(130, 76, 29, 0.38); font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-shadow: 1px 1px 0 rgba(255, 235, 178, 0.88), 2px 2px 0 rgba(55, 24, 7, 0.22) !important;}#article-container h1::before,#article-container h2::before,#article-container h3::before { color: var(--pixel-brass) !important;}#article-container blockquote { color: #321a0b; border-left: 5px solid var(--pixel-brass); border-radius: 2px; background: rgba(255, 232, 173, 0.42); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px rgba(116, 66, 20, 0.18);}#article-container code,pre,figure.highlight { border: 2px solid rgba(136, 85, 35, 0.58); border-radius: 2px !important; background: rgba(32, 20, 12, 0.88) !important; color: #ffe6a4 !important; font-family: var(--pixel-mono) !important;}hr { border: 0; height: 8px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0 8px, var(--pixel-paper-edge) 8px 16px, transparent 16px 24px) repeat-x; background-size: 24px 8px;}#rightside > div > button,#rightside > div > a { border: 2px solid var(--pixel-gold) !important; border-radius: 2px !important; background: rgba(35, 25, 15, 0.78) !important; box-shadow: 3px 3px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45);}.local-search-input input { border: 2px solid rgba(117, 72, 29, 0.58) !important; border-radius: 2px !important; background: rgba(255, 232, 174, 0.54) !important;}#footer { border-top: 4px solid rgba(107, 86, 52, 0.86); background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(7, 10, 8, 0.32), rgba(7, 10, 8, 0.8)), url("/img/pixel-medieval/hero-castle.png") center bottom / cover no-repeat !important;}.pixel-spark { position: fixed; z-index: 99999; width: 6px; height: 6px; pointer-events: none; background: var(--pixel-gold-bright); box-shadow: 8px 0 0 var(--pixel-gold), -8px 0 0 var(--pixel-gold), 0 8px 0 var(--pixel-moss), 0 -8px 0 var(--pixel-moss); animation: pixelSpark 620ms steps(5, end) forwards;}@keyframes pixelSpark { 0% { opacity: 1; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); } 100% { opacity: 0; transform: translate(-50%, -68px) scale(0); }}@media (max-width: 768px) { #page-header.full_page #site-info { top: 46% !important; width: 96vw; } #page-header.full_page #site-title { width: min(95vw, 620px); } #blog-info .nav-site-title .site-name { width: 148px; height: 44px; } #nav .menus_item span, #search-button span span { font-size: 0.92rem; } .card-widget, .recent-post-item, #post, #page { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #211007, 0 0 0 4px rgba(218, 171, 89, 0.32), 5px 5px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.36), inset 0 0 24px rgba(92, 45, 12, 0.2) !important; }}
